result.stdout:
osdp Protocol Support Tools

Usage: osdp [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -v|--version  

Commands:
  acu           Simulate an osdp acu
  clear         Clear items
  import        Import an osdpcap file
  list          List items
  listen        Listen to OSDP communication
  pd            Simulates an osdp pd

Run 'osdp [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
osdp Protocol Support Tools

Usage: osdp [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -v|--version  

Commands:
  acu           Simulate an osdp acu
  clear         Clear items
  import        Import an osdpcap file
  list          List items
  listen        Listen to OSDP communication
  pd            Simulates an osdp pd

Run 'osdp [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Simulate an osdp acu

Usage: osdp acu [options]

Options:
  -f|--file     File to download using OSDP file transfer
  -k|--scbk     Secure channel base key (hex)
  -p|--port     Port name (COMn: | /dev/tty.usbserial* | /dev/ttyusb*)
  -r|--rate     Baud rate (9600 | 19200 | 38400 | 57600 | 115200 | 230400)
                Default value is: 230400.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Import an osdpcap file

Usage: osdp import [options]

Options:
  -f|--filter   Filter out POLL/ACK pairs

result.stdout:
List items

Usage: osdp list [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  keys          Lists the keys captured from the OSDP bus
  ports         Lists the serial ports installed on this machine

Run 'list [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Listen to OSDP communication

Usage: osdp listen [options]

Options:
  -c|--capture        Log to osdpcap
  -t|--filetransfer   Capture OSDP files
  -e|--elasticsearch  Elasticsearch event sink URL
  -f|--filter         Filter out POLL/ACK pairs
  -p|--port           Port name (COMn: | /dev/tty.usbserial* | /dev/ttyusb*)
  -r|--rate           Baud rate (auto | 9600 | 19200 | 38400 | 57600 | 115200 |
                      230400)
  -s|--seq            SEQ event sink URL
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information.

commands.payload:
Listen to OSDP communication

Usage: osdp listen [options]

Options:
  -c|--capture        Log to osdpcap
  -t|--filetransfer   Capture OSDP files
  -e|--elasticsearch  Elasticsearch event sink URL
  -f|--filter         Filter out POLL/ACK pairs
  -p|--port           Port name (COMn: | /dev/tty.usbserial* | /dev/ttyusb*)
  -r|--rate           Baud rate (auto | 9600 | 19200 | 38400 | 57600 | 115200 |
                      230400)
  -s|--seq            SEQ event sink URL
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information.

result.stdout:
Simulates an osdp pd

Usage: osdp pd [options]

Options:
  -p|--port             Port name (COMn: | /dev/tty.usbserial* | /dev/ttyusb*)
  -r|--rate             Baud rate (9600 | 19200 | 38400 | 57600 | 115200 |
                        230400)
  -a|--address          Address of PD (0..126
  -g|--generate-events  Generate test events
  -k|--scbk             Secure channel base key (hex)
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.
